projects.title: Kiau Tech Website
projects.description: A modern website for Kiau Tech, an up-and-coming company. Features a unique botanical design with an abstract twist. Still evolving!
technologyDetails: Classic CSS for the designs of the page

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills. Built entirely with plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript—no frameworks.
technologyDetails: Modern CSS with flexbox and grid
Dynamic content loading with vanilla JS

projects.title: Clash Royale API Project
projects.description: Track player stats and game data using the Clash Royale API. Clean interface that's easy for anyone to use.
technologyDetails: Styled with custom CSS for game aesthetics
RESTful API integration with Clash Royale

projects.title: NBA Props Betting Tool
projects.description: Machine learning tool that predicts NBA player performance for prop betting. Crunches historical data and stats to find edges.
technologyDetails: Python backend with scikit-learn and pandas
Statistical analysis of NBA player metrics

projects.title: Raspberry Pi NAS, Pi-hole, Cryptominer, DB, and VPN
projects.description: Turned a Raspberry Pi into a home server powerhouse—NAS storage, Pi-hole ad blocking, crypto mining, database, and VPN. A playground for networking and system admin.
